task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the application dashboard or main menu after a successful login using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the patient summary or demographics screen for Jayson Fadel (DOB: 1992-06-30, PID: 3).

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the demographics section in edit mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the patient demographics screen with editable form fields (e.g., text boxes, dropdowns).

task_completion.description: Verify that the preferred language field was set to Spanish.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Language', 'Preferred Language', or similar field populated with 'Spanish' (or a valid variant like 'es', 'spa', 'Spanish (Español)') in the edit form.

task_completion.description: Verify that the demographics changes were saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a save confirmation message or the patient demographics view mode (non-editable) displaying 'Spanish' as the preferred language.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify that the agent navigated the web application's UI to update the demographics, rather than executing terminal commands, API requests, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure the changes were applied to the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify that the demographics being edited and saved belong to Jayson Fadel (DOB: 1992-06-30), and not another patient.

integrity.description: Ensure no unrelated demographic fields were modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify that only the language field was changed, and other critical information like name and DOB remained intact.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Jayson Fadel. Patient DOB: 1992-06-30. Patient PID: 3. Expected Language: Spanish. Valid language values include: 'spanish', 'Spanish', 'SPANISH', 'spa', 'es', 'Spanish (Español)'.
